---
title: "Getting Started with gtsummary"
---

## Overview

`gtsummary` creates publication-ready analytical and summary tables in R.

## Installation

```{r}
#| eval: false
install.packages("gtsummary")
```

## Basic Example

```{r}
#| eval: false
library(gtsummary)

# Create a summary table
trial %>%
  tbl_summary(
    include = c(age, grade, response),
    by = trt
  ) %>%
  add_p()
```

## Resources

- [gtsummary documentation](https://www.danieldsjoberg.com/gtsummary/)
- [gtsummary gallery](https://www.danieldsjoberg.com/gtsummary/articles/gallery.html)
